name: small metal room
description: I'm in a small metal room
hints: A small metal room with no obvious exits. The force field is the way back.
If a force field is present, you can GO FIELD to return to room 2.
GO FIELD to pass through and reach the control console room. This room may serve as an airlock or transition chamber.
notes: Small metal room accessible through the force field from room 2. Going through the force field here returns to room 2 safely (unlike the deadly passage from room 2 to here). Functions as a transition chamber.
